name: X-Golf Cedar Rapids
address: 5235 Buffalo Rdg Dr Suite 100, Cedar Rapids, IA 52411
about: X-Golf Cedar Rapids offers an indoor golf simulation experience utilizing advanced technology to provide accurate ball tracking and realistic gameplay. The venue features a full bar and food menu, making it suitable for social gatherings, casual play, and serious practice alike. It accommodates various activities including leagues, tournaments, private lessons, and events for groups up to 125 guests.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art simulator technology for realistic ball flight and gameplay
Full-service bar and food menu available on-site
Access to professional coaching and game analysis
Multiple league options for competitive and social play

food_and_drink.notes: Full food menu available; details require direct contact
Full bar available; details require direct contact

simulator_hardware.notes: State-of-the-art system combining camera systems, infrared lasers, and impact sensors

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: Club rental is available, and players can use their own clubs if they prefer.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drinks are not permitted. The venue offers a full bar and food menu.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Generally, it takes about one hour for an individual player to complete 18 holes. Additional players may require extra time depending on skill level.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, X-Golf Cedar Rapids welcomes children of all ages and offers junior leagues.
